name: Lemon Cream Cheese Pie with Blueberries
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces nonfat cream cheese, at room temperature
14 ounces nonfat sweetened condensed milk, canned
1 teaspoon grated lemon rind, fresh, optional
1 pie crust, graham cracker crumb, prepared 8-inch (shortbread or choc wafer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Continue to beat as you slowly pour the condensed milk into the cream cheese.
3. Beat until smooth. Stir in lemon juice, lemon peel and vanilla.
4. Pour mixture into prepared crust.
5. Puree 1/3 cup blueberries or other fruit.
6. Drizzle on top of prepared pie.
7. Run a knife throughout the pie to create a swirled effect.
8. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours.
9. Top with remaining blueberries or other fruit.
Makes 6 servings.
Variations: You can use fresh strawberries, blackberries, or raspberries instead of blueberries.
